case_title: PUI CHU HOW VS. BEN WONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: NONE SERVED JAN-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK INFORMED JUDGE PROOF OF SERVICE SAYS DEFENDANT'S CLAIM WAS SERVED AND HAS TYPO IN DATE OF 2015. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, WHO WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER MARGARET HOW-SZETO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY HOW, PUI CHU AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, BEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOW, PUI CHU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, BEN $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
